cards.title: Phase 1: Audio Polish & Settings Menu
cards.body:
- Add BGM volume slider and SFX volume slider in settings menu
- Add mute toggle button on HUD
- Create Settings/Options screen with audio controls
- Add multiple BGM tracks: calm (menu), tense (gameplay), epic (boss)
- Add pause screen BGM attenuation (lower volume)
- Add sound effects: whoosh on hover, power-up collect sound variant, level-up chime

cards.title: Phase 1: Visual Polish & Screen Effects
cards.body:
- Add screen flash on boss death, level transition wipe effect
- Add 'Level Up' text animation with score popup
- Add 'Boss Incoming!' warning screen with countdown
- Add damage number styling (bigger numbers, color coding: blue=crit, red=dmg)
- Add particle trails for enemy lasers and player bullets
- Add glow/bloom effect during unleash mode
- Add ship upgrade visual effect (flash, particles, screen shake)
- Add screen edge vignette effect when player is low on health
- Add 'Boss Defeated!' celebration effect

cards.title: Phase 1: More Content - Enemies & Weapons
cards.body:
- Add 3-4 new enemy types: Shielded Drone (blocks shots), Mine Layer, Teleporter, Swarm Spawner
- Each enemy has unique behavior, health, score, and attack pattern
- Add 2 new boss variants with different attack phases
- Add 2 new power-up types: Shield (temporary damage immunity), Speed Boost (faster movement), Slow-Motion (slows time)
- Add weapon upgrades that persist: Double Shot, Spread Shot, Rapid Fire as permanent unlocks
- Add enemy variety per level: mix of 3-4 enemy types in formation rows

cards.title: Phase 2: Progression System & Save/Load
cards.body:
- Add persistent save system (localStorage) for high scores and unlocks
- Add ship upgrade shop between levels (spend score points on upgrades)
- Add ship skins/unlockables (color variations, special visual effects)
- Add achievement system (first kill, level 10, 100 kills, etc.)
- Add daily/weekly challenges with score multipliers
- Add game modes: Arcade (finite levels), Endless (infinite, scales difficulty)
- Add leaderboards (local + online if possible)

cards.title: Phase 2: Game Menus & Meta Structure
cards.body:
- Restructure game into: Main Menu -> Mode Select -> Game -> Results Screen
- Main Menu with animated background, Start Game, Endless Mode, Settings, Credits
- Mode Select: Arcade Campaign, Endless (infinite), Daily Challenge
- Results screen with detailed stats: enemies killed, accuracy, time survived, rank
- Add 'Continue' after game over if player has enough score points
- Add loading screen between sections
- Add tutorial overlay on first playthrough

cards.title: Phase 3: Platform Readiness & Distribution
cards.body:
- Package as PWA (Progressive Web App) with service worker for offline play
- Add iOS/Android compatibility fixes (safe area insets, orientation locking)
- Create app icons and splash screens for mobile
- Add manifest.json for PWA install prompt
- Test on multiple browsers: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge
- Add analytics/anonymized usage tracking (optional)
- Performance audit: optimize rendering, reduce memory usage, ensure 60fps on mobile

cards.title: Phase 3: Marketing Assets & Distribution Prep
cards.body:
- Add screenshot capture on gameover (canvas.toDataURL for shareable image)
- Add 'Share Score' functionality (Twitter/X, Facebook, link copy)
- Create app store listing assets: screenshots, description, feature list
- Add credits screen with developer info and attribution
- Add license.txt and copyright notice
- Prepare distribution packages: itch.io page, Newgrounds, game jam submission
- Add 'How to Play' tutorial with interactive walkthrough

cards.title: Make it mobile friendly (responsive, touch support, etc)
cards.body:
- Add viewport meta tag and responsive canvas sizing
- Implement touch event handlers (touchstart, touchmove, touchend) to replace mouse events on mobile
- Prevent default touch behaviors (scroll, zoom) during gameplay
- Auto-fire on touch (don't require holding)
- Scale UI elements for smaller screens
- Test on both portrait and landscape orientations
- Add mobile-specific CSS (cursor: default on touch devices, hide HUD elements on very small screens)

cards.title: Create background music
cards.body:
- Add procedural background music loop via Web Audio API
- Create a subtle ambient synth track (no external files)
- Use short looping pattern (2-4 measures) with layered oscillators
- Add volume control / mute toggle in UI
- BGM should fade out during Game Over, resume on new game
- Ensure BGM doesn't overpower laser/explosion sounds

cards.title: Change enemy generation to groups of rows
cards.body:
- Replace random wave spawning with structured row-based formations
- Spawn enemies in grid-like rows (classic Space Invaders style)
- Rows descend gradually toward the player
- Each row can contain different enemy types (e.g., front row = babies, back row = mediums)
- Boss still appears every 5 levels (no rows, just single boss + mini-swarm)
- Update level progression logic for row clear conditions
- Keep sine wave movement for individual enemies within the row formation
